method: re-rendered actual tinygrad kernel names from the owned+Q4K bucket audit; reclassified the heuristic 'norm_rope_small_ops' which mislabels the KV copy

rows.evidence: q4k_gemv_warp_12288_4096 (2879us, gate/up) + q6k_coop_partial_4096_12288 (1334us, down Q6K) + q4k_gemv_warp_4096_12288 (988us); = llama mmvq share

rows.bucket: weight GEMV: attn q/o/k/v proj + lm_head
rows.evidence: q4k_coop_partial_4096_4096 (1360us q/o, NON-warp coop) + attn_kv_proj 400us + q6k_coop_partial_151936 (662us lm_head)
rows.actionable: marginal -- q/o proj uses non-warp coop; extending the warp GEMV primitive could help but overall weight-GEMV is at parity

rows.evidence: E_49152_32_3 (758us) + E_49152_32_3n1 (787us) = full-MAXC canonical store materialization; classify() mislabels it as norm_rope_small_ops
rows.actionable: YES -- runtime-KV lane; prior MAXC-shrink showed ~+1.5ms/+8 tok/s; blocked by opaque-append NaN (owned-tile side now fixed -> re-diagnose)

rows.evidence: r_1024_16_4_2_32 (641us), r_16_256 (~450us), r_2_8_128 (893us KV-proj reduce), rope/norm; many UNFUSED kernels vs llama fused rmsnorm/rope/residual
rows.actionable: YES but codegen-hard -- tinygrad emits many small unfused kernels; fusion is a native-codegen lane

rows.evidence: ffn_activation bucket; llama fuses silu into the GEMV epilogue + q8 quant
owned_flash_tile_gqa 434us + owned_flash_combine 229us vs llama tile 342 + combine 116 + streamk 49
rows.actionable: no -- near-parity (the owned route solved attention)

headline: Attention and weight-GEMV are at/near llama parity. Residual gap = KV-copy materialization (1.3ms), unfused small-ops/norm (1.2ms), unfused FFN activation (1.0ms) -- GPU-busy; ~2ms overlapped, wall gap +1.73ms.
